articulation_gaps.description: Underexplained mechanisms that represent positioning opportunity

gaps.opportunity: Nobody has articulated why reference material changes AI output at a technical level
No competitor guarantees a minimum quality level. Specimens create a floor, not just a ceiling.
Market doesn't distinguish between post-processing (humanizers) and pre-processing (calibration). Huge positioning win.
